title_hint: The Age of the Accidental Builder: AI Is Handing Everyone a Shovel
description: AI is demolishing the barrier between 'I have an idea' and 'I shipped a product'. Anyone with a laptop and enough stubbornness can now build invoicing apps, SaaS tools, or whatever they convinced themselves the world needs. The entry cost to building is approaching zero — the exit cost of a bad idea hasn't changed. Explore the real pros and cons of this democratization, draw parallels with building Fakturant (a Czech invoicing app built solo with Claude Code), and make honest predictions about where this trend is heading — complete with the uncomfortable parts nobody wants to say out loud.
audience: Indie hackers, aspiring founders, developers considering building solo, and anyone watching AI eat the startup world
